title: Visualiza Coherente
description:
Visualiza Coherente is a local-first, installable PWA for computing and exploring CU values (16 digits + extended precision) and visualizing structural profiles using Sᵢ functions (dual chain A/B) with bars and 2D/3D ellipses.

No servers, no trackers: it runs fully in the browser and supports offline usage via a Service Worker.
notes: This repository is a static web app (HTML/CSS/JS). Host it on any HTTPS-capable static server (GitHub Pages, Vercel, etc.).
